roa.docketEntryComment: DEFT'S PC1538,5 MOTION TO SUPPRESS EVIDENCE FILED

/CAL PRETRIAL CONFERENCE/X OVER OBJECTION OF THE ADA, COURT FINDS GOOD CASE TO REFER DEFENDANT TO PRETRIAL DIVERSION, PLEA IS WITHDRAWN,/X:COUNT 1CHARGING 594(B)1PC IS REFERRED TO PRETRIAL DIVERSION FOR AN ELIGIBILITY REPORT,/DEF:IS TO COMPLETE 12 SESSIONS OF ALCOHOL COUNSELING AND PAY RESTITUTION, IF ANY, TO BE MONITORED BY PTD/PTDIV:01-09-14/CONT/DOPU:A POSITIVE REPORT FROM PRETRIAL DIVERSION/

/CAL:ARRAIGNMENT/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/987,2/X:PUBLIC DEFENDER'S ORAL MOTION FOR MISDEMEANOR REDUCTION PURSUANT TO PC 17(B) ISDENIED WITHOUT PREJUDICE,/FAWC/DEFTARR1/OR/CTORD:AS A FURTHER CONDITIONOF RELEASE DEFENDANT SHALL CHECK IN WITH SPR 3 TIMES PER WEEK BY PHONE,/NTW60/LD:FOR PRELIMINARY HEARING IS 07-08-13/SA2:(50 YARDS) INTERSECTION 18TH AND HARRISON STREETS, S,F,, CA/SAORD/CONTD:PREHEARING CONFERENCE/DOP/
/CAL:PRETRIAL DIVERSION PROGRESS REPORT/DAWT/TEXT: COURT GRTS MOTION TO DISM PURS PC 1001,7 AS TO COUNT 1/1001,7:1/DISM3/
